description_long: This is a modern commercial passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of long, swept-back wings featuring upward-angled winglets at the tips. The aircraft is painted primarily white with the Qatar Airways livery, including the maroon Oryx logo on the tail and large 'QATAR' lettering along the fuselage. Two large turbofan engines are mounted under the wings, and the airplane has a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows visible. The landing gear is not visible in these images, suggesting it is likely retractable and currently stowed. The overall design is sleek and optimized for efficient, long-distance flight.
description: A sleek, white commercial passenger airplane with Qatar Airways livery, swept-back wings with winglets, and twin underwing turbofan engines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, cockpit windows, and the full wingspan with upward-angled winglets and visible engine intakes.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the fuselage, Qatar Airways branding, tail logo, and both engines under the wing.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the trailing edges of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other side of the fuselage, engines, and tail logo.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with long, swept-back wings and upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle (not visible, inferred from typical design)
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows
